ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient (income inequality measure) */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Human Development Index (HDI) score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the health indicator (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (Male, Female, Both sexes) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator for the specified gender */,
  "lower_confidence_interval" REAL /* Lower confidence interval for the estimate */,
  "upper_confidence_interval" REAL /* Upper confidence interval for the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country for the specified year */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population of the country for the specified year */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population of the country for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the official language */,
  "speakers" INTEGER /* Number of speakers of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the capital city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the capital city */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the capital city in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capitals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the data (e.g., global, regional, national) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES health_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES health_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gender_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the health policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the health policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the health policy */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the health policy */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the health policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_policies_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_indicators" (
  "policy_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy indicator */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health policy */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the health indicator */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value achieved for the health indicator */,
  "baseline_value" REAL /* Baseline value for the health indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_indicators_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES health_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* List of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gender_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the quality metric was measured */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gender_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
